narrativeOwner: Jon Carvill, VP Marketing & Communications; Joni Cholwich, Acting VP NEO; Spring Fu, MD The Academy

assessment.headline: MBZUAI's media presence is strengthening with high-profile coverage from NHK Japan, an upcoming CNN interview, and sustained engagement from the Google $1M grant announcement. The 5-year anniversary campaign is in planning with 15-20 videos scheduled throughout 2026, and year-round Abu Dhabi airport activations are expanding brand awareness. JAIS and K2Think continue to see growing adoption, with API requests accelerating.
whereWeStand: MBZUAI has entered the top 100 in the QS AI & Computer Science Subject Ranking for the first time (87th, up from 101st). CSRankings overall position improved 16 places (78→62) year-on-year.
CSRankings Core AI Fields position improved to 38th (from 52nd) — reflecting MBZUAI's focused mission in AI, ML, NLP, and Computer Vision.
NHK Japan visited campus for a feature reaching an estimated 300M viewers — MBZUAI's first major Japanese media exposure. The segment is expected to air in March.
CNN has confirmed an interview on AI in the Middle East with Prof. Xing — date TBC. This is the highest-profile broadcast opportunity this quarter.
The Google $1M grant announcement generated multi-outlet coverage and 45,000 LinkedIn impressions — among the strongest social engagement numbers for any MBZUAI announcement this year.
whatsNext: CNN interview date to be confirmed — preparation underway. **Owner: Jon Carvill**
Wired ME feature expected late March. **Owner: Jon Carvill**
5-year anniversary video series entering production — 15-20 videos planned throughout 2026. **Owner: Jon Carvill**
Phase 1 of the new MBZUAI website on track for May delivery. **Owner: Jon Carvill**
UG AIR campaign and updated recruitment campaign assets in development. **Owner: Jon Carvill**

mediaHighlights.title: Campus Visit and Faculty Interviews
mediaHighlights.description: NHK World visited the MBZUAI campus for a full-day shoot, conducting interviews with faculty and students for a feature on AI education in the Gulf region. This is MBZUAI's first major Japanese media exposure and will reach NHK's estimated 300M global viewership.
mediaHighlights.significance: First Japanese media feature. Expands MBZUAI's visibility beyond English-language and Middle Eastern outlets into the East Asian market — important for faculty recruitment and student pipeline from Japan and Korea.

mediaHighlights.title: Interview on AI in the Middle East — Date TBC
mediaHighlights.description: CNN has confirmed an interview segment on AI development in the Middle East, with MBZUAI featured as a leading institution. The interview will focus on JAIS, Arabic AI, and the university's role in the UAE's AI strategy.
mediaHighlights.significance: Highest-profile broadcast opportunity this quarter. CNN coverage positions MBZUAI alongside major global AI institutions. Critical for government and donor narrative.

mediaHighlights.title: Interview with Eric Xing on AI University Models
mediaHighlights.description: In-depth interview with Prof. Xing published in FT's education section, covering MBZUAI's unique model as a dedicated AI university, the JAIS project, and the university's role in the UAE's knowledge economy strategy.
mediaHighlights.reach: FT global readership (~5.7M monthly unique readers)
mediaHighlights.significance: FT is a key outlet for MBZUAI's target audiences — board members, government officials, donors, and prospective faculty all read it. The article positions Xing as a thought leader on AI education.

mediaHighlights.title: Feature on MBZUAI's AI Research Ecosystem
mediaHighlights.status: Interview completed — publication expected late March
mediaHighlights.description: Wired ME conducted on-campus interviews for a feature on MBZUAI's research ecosystem, focusing on the JAIS model, the Agentic Robotics Lab, and the Biological and Life Sciences division's AI-for-science work.
mediaHighlights.significance: Wired carries strong credibility in the tech community. Coverage of multiple research areas (not just JAIS) broadens the narrative about MBZUAI's capabilities.

mediaHighlights.outlet: Gulf News / The National / Tech outlets
mediaHighlights.title: Google $1M Research Grant Announcement
mediaHighlights.description: The announcement of Google's $1M research grant for Arabic AI Safety generated coverage across Gulf News, The National, and multiple international tech outlets. Social media engagement was strong, with the LinkedIn post reaching 45,000 impressions.
mediaHighlights.significance: Validates MBZUAI's position as a partner of choice for major tech companies on Arabic AI. The social engagement numbers were among the highest for any MBZUAI announcement this year.

campaigns.name: 5-Year Anniversary Video Series
campaigns.briefDescription: Series of 15-20 videos celebrating MBZUAI's 5th anniversary, showcasing achievements and vision.
campaigns.fullDescription: A major brand-building campaign featuring 15-20 professionally produced videos scheduled for delivery throughout 2026. Videos will cover key milestones, faculty profiles, student stories, research breakthroughs, and the university's vision for the next five years.
campaigns.timeline: Production starting Q2 2026, rolling release throughout 2026
campaigns.channels: YouTube, LinkedIn, university website, social media, campus screens

campaigns.name: Abu Dhabi Airport Activations
campaigns.briefDescription: Year-round MBZUAI brand awareness campaign at Abu Dhabi International Airport.
campaigns.fullDescription: Continuous digital display presence in arrivals and departures terminals at Abu Dhabi International Airport. Estimated reach of 24M annual airport passengers including international visitors, business travelers, and government officials.
campaigns.channels: Digital displays — arrivals and departures terminals

campaigns.name: UG AIR Campaign
campaigns.briefDescription: Undergraduate recruitment campaign targeting prospective students across the region.
campaigns.fullDescription: Recruitment-focused campaign for the undergraduate program, targeting prospective students in the UAE, GCC, and broader MENA region. Campaign assets being developed with updated messaging reflecting Cohort 1 achievements.
campaigns.channels: Digital advertising, school outreach, social media, university website

campaigns.name: Graduate Recruitment Campaign Refresh
campaigns.briefDescription: Updated campaign assets for graduate program recruitment cycle.
campaigns.fullDescription: Refresh of graduate recruitment campaign assets to reflect growing application numbers, new programs (MAAI), and recent research achievements. Targeting international applicant pool.
campaigns.timeline: Assets in development, launch aligned with next recruitment cycle
campaigns.channels: Digital advertising, academic platforms, social media, university website

campaigns.name: AI for All Campaign (The Academy)
campaigns.briefDescription: Public awareness campaign making AI accessible to non-technical audiences.
campaigns.fullDescription: Ongoing campaign tied to The Academy's public workshop series. Rollout through January and across the year. Aims to position MBZUAI as the go-to institution for AI education at all levels.
campaigns.channels: Social media, community events, workshop promotion, local media
campaigns.owner: Jon Carvill, VP Marketing & Communications (jointly with The Academy)

modelDownloads.modelComparison: K2Think outperforms larger models on Arabic reasoning benchmarks at 60% fewer parameters — competitive with models 3x its size on MMLU-AR and ArabicQA.

researchImpact.target2026: 100K total downloads for K2Think, 5K for JAIS by end of 2026

rankings.note: First time inside the top 100. Subject-specific ranking.
Research-output-based ranking across all CS subfields.
Ranking in core AI fields: AI, ML, NLP, Computer Vision. Reflects MBZUAI's focused mission.

ifmExecutive.executiveSummary: Foundation model adoption is being led by K2, with the newest K2 variants driving recent momentum; JAIS remains smaller in user base but still contributes meaningful request volume.

engagementDiplomacy.assessmentSummary: This month's delegation pipeline is weighted toward strategic partnership progression, with high-value visits from major government, academic, and industry institutions. Three delegations require presidential participation, and one visit represents reactivation of a previously dormant relationship with significant collaboration potential.

eventsDelivered.name: Nexus Symposium: Security in the Age of AI
eventsDelivered.description: Full-day symposium on AI security challenges featuring 14 international speakers. Topics included adversarial AI, autonomous weapons governance, cybersecurity, and privacy-preserving computation.
notableAttendees: Dr. Ian Hogarth, Chair of the UK AI Safety Institute
Dr. Rumman Chowdhury, Former Director of ML Ethics at Twitter
Representatives from UAE National Cybersecurity Authority
eventsDelivered.significance: Positioned MBZUAI at the center of the AI safety conversation. Attendance from the UK AI Safety Institute and UAE NCA demonstrates convening power across government and academia.
eventsDelivered.mediaGenerated: Covered by The National and Arab News

eventsDelivered.name: ML Winter School 2026
eventsDelivered.description: Intensive 5-day program covering foundational and advanced topics in machine learning. Targeted at graduate students and early-career researchers from the MENA region.
notableAttendees: Sponsored students from KAUST, AUS, and Khalifa University
eventsDelivered.significance: Builds MBZUAI's reputation as a regional hub for ML education. 22 universities represented demonstrates broad reach. Sponsored attendance builds goodwill with peer institutions.

eventsDelivered.name: VVIP Engagement — February 8
eventsDelivered.description: Two high-level VVIP engagements delivered on campus, including a week-long protocol support for H.H. Sheikha Fatima bint Abdullah bin Zayed Al Nahyan and support for a visit by UAE and Egypt presidents.
notableAttendees: H.H. Sheikha Fatima bint Abdullah bin Zayed Al Nahyan
Senior UAE and Egyptian government officials
eventsDelivered.significance: VVIP engagements demonstrate MBZUAI's standing within the UAE's diplomatic and royal protocol ecosystem. Direct exposure to senior government decision-makers.

eventsDelivered.name: NEP AI Track Roadshow
eventsDelivered.description: Hosted the National Experts Program AI Track roadshow, showcasing MBZUAI's role in national AI talent development to NEP participants and government stakeholders.
eventsDelivered.significance: Aligns MBZUAI with UAE national talent strategy. NEP engagement strengthens government positioning and Emirati pipeline.

outreachEducation.assessmentSummary: This period, the Academy deepened MBZUAI's influence with senior government, diplomatic, and industry leaders through flagship executive programs and selective convenings. The strongest signals are high-level participant quality, continued traction in government-facing capability-building, and a growing set of Academy platforms that extend MBZUAI's reach beyond degree education.

academyPrograms.description: Five-day intensive program for ADNOC senior managers covering AI strategy, implementation, and change management. Customized curriculum with ADNOC-specific use cases in energy optimization and predictive maintenance.
academyPrograms.significance: ADNOC is a flagship Academy client. Repeat engagement (3rd cohort) demonstrates program stickiness and deepens the institutional relationship.

academyPrograms.programName: AI for Government Leaders — UAE Federal Authority
academyPrograms.description: Three-day program for senior government officials covering AI-enabled governance, data strategy, and ethical AI deployment in public services.
academyPrograms.significance: Government client deepens MBZUAI's positioning as the UAE's AI education partner for the public sector. Aligns with UAE AI-enabled governance initiatives mentioned in NEO updates.

academyPrograms.programName: AI for All — Public Workshop Series
academyPrograms.description: Monthly public workshop series making AI accessible to non-technical audiences. February session focused on 'AI in Daily Life' with hands-on demos. Part of the broader 'AI for All' campaign.
academyPrograms.significance: Community engagement supports MBZUAI's social license and public visibility in Abu Dhabi. Part of the broader AI for All campaign rolling out through 2026.
